channel.title: zfs on Olivia Sculley
channel.description: Recent content in zfs on Olivia Sculley

item.title: Remember to feed your ZFS array
item.description: So, I’ve talked about my project server in the past, but I wanted to give a bit of an update after upgrading my server a bit. I go over more details in the previous post, but basically I had been running over 100 docker containers of various personal services with only 32 gigs of ram, which resulted in a bit of swap usage and no excess available ram, until now!
